properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where He may lead me, I will go, For I have learned to trust Him so, And I remember'twas for me, That He was slain on Calvary.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus shall lead me night and day, Jesus shall lead me all the way, He is the truest Friend to me, For I remember Calvary.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, I delight in His command, Love to be lead by His dear hand; His divine will is sweet to me, Hallowed by blood-stained Calvary.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Onward I go, no doubt, nor fear, Happy with Christ my Savior near, Trusting that I some day shall see, Jesus, my Friend of Calvary.
